name: Clinical Research Intake
description: Clinical research intake for clinical investigators and research coordinators initiating a clinical study. Evaluates the clinical question, the study design, the regulatory pathway, the site readiness, the participant population, the safety monitoring plan, and the data management requirements to produce a clinical research intake profile with regulatory compliance checklist and site readiness assessment. Not medical or legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
